justification: The diff correctly migrates JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) and updates Java version to 21 in CI/build configs. It uses pattern matching for instanceof (Java 16+) and String.formatted (Java 15+), which are idiomatic for Java 21. The @Serial annotation (Java 14+) is correctly added to serialVersionUID fields. The migration is clean with no spurious churn, though it doesn't leverage newer Java 21 features like virtual threads or record patterns, keeping it conservative but solid.
